posts.author: hjones (Heather)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I need to be able to share a gallery view with people who are not in my organization. I do not want them having to sign up to view it. But when I copy the shareable link to the gallery view for my board, I just get a notice that the widget is unavailable in broadcast.

What are you trying to achieve

My team uses gallery view for our assets. We need to share an easy-to-navigate asset library with people outside our organization and they should not need to create an account or join our team to view this. We do not need them to have access to the table view or any other information in our board.
